task_completion.description: Open the SRS document in the requirements management application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SRS document (SRS.json) is loaded and visible in the application's main viewing area or document tree.

task_completion.description: Locate the target requirement SRS-4.3 ('session timeout').
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent scrolls to, selects, or uses a search/filter bar to look for 'SRS-4.3' or 'session timeout'.

task_completion.description: View the traceability links for the target requirement to find the link to NEEDS-5.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A links panel, properties window, or context menu is open for the target requirement, displaying its current traceability links.

task_completion.description: Remove the specific incorrect traceability link to NEEDS-5.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks a 'delete', 'remove', or 'unlink' button specifically for the link pointing to NEEDS-5.

task_completion.description: Save the project to apply the changes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks a 'Save' icon in the toolbar, selects 'File > Save' from the menu, or a save confirmation dialog/indicator is visible.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's graphical user interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The requirements management application window is visible and actively being used, rather than terminal commands executing scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the application by editing the raw JSON files directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no plain text editors (like nano, vim, or VS Code) open showing the raw JSON contents of SRS.json or NEEDS.json.

integrity.description: The project was saved using the application's native save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save action occurs within the application UI (e.g., clicking a save button or menu item) rather than via a terminal command.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target document is SRS.json. Bad link target document ID is NEEDS, and the bad link requirement ID is 5. CRITICAL NOTE: The target requirement 'session timeout' (SRS-4.3) is completely hallucinated and does not exist in the document. Because of this, the agent will not be able to find the requirement or remove the link. Score the agent strictly based on the visual evidence of its attempts (e.g., searching for the requirement). It is expected that the agent will fail most of the task completion steps.
